name: Further Confusion
description: FC celebrates the anthropomorphic genre and the furry fandom, and is typically held in late January across the weekend of Martin Luther King Jr. Day.

name: Furrymosa
description: Furrymosa is a furry/kemono book and goods fair event which is held annually in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Brasil FurFest
description: Brasil FurFest, or BFF, is the first hotel-based furry convention to happen in Brazil. It was first held over September 9-11, 2016. Currently the biggest furry convention in Brazil.

name: Anthro Weekend Utah
description: Anthro Weekend Utah is a non-profit organization with a goal of bringing all ages of the community and furry fandom together.

name: AnthroExpo
description: AnthroExpo (also known as AnEx) is an annual hotel-based furry convention that takes place in central Oklahoma. We started back in 2020, and have been growing quickly ever since.

name: AquatiFur
description: AquatiFur, or AQF, is a furry fandom convention located in the heart of Wisconsin - the “Waterpark Capital of the World” - at the Chula Vista Resort!

name: Antheria
description: Antheria was a furry convention located in Redondo Beach, California, USA. Originally slated to be at the Westin Los Angeles Airport, the venue was changed to the Best Western Sunrise just over a week before the inaugural convention.

name: Scotiacon
description: Welcome to Scotiacon, Scotlands first (and currently only!) furry convention! Our first event was in 2011 and we’ve worked hard to make our event bigger and better every year, bringing together furries from all around the globe to celebrate our community and shared interests.

name: Furry Weekend Atlanta
description: Furry Weekend Atlanta is one of the largest furry conventions in the world! We are a community-driven, volunteer-led organization that is devoted to providing memorable, educational, inclusive, and safe experiences where our community is encouraged to explore and express their true self.

name: Furway
description: Furway is a non-profit Norwegian furry convention held outdoors. Some would say it’s a camping con, but with indoor sleeping capacity and modern toilets and showers it’s more of a hybrid type of experience.

name: Camp Mani-Toebeans
description: Camping furry convention in Manitoba Canada. Cabins, food, and activities all provided with registration.

name: Furry Takeover
description: Furry Takeover is a convention with cabins, hotel rooms, and campsites available. Located in the mountains, the resort has very little to no cell service in most areas.

name: Lone Star Fur Con
description: Lone Star Fur Con is proudly brought to you by Anthro Outreach LLC—a small, passionate Texas-based team with a huge love for the fandom. We launched Anthro Outreach in early 2024 to handle all the planning and logistics required to make LSFC a reality.

name: StratosFur
description: StratosFur is an annual furry convention in Houston, Texas; a Con in Houston for all Furkind!

name: Anthrofest
description: Anthrofest (was also known as the International Anthropomorphics Festival) was a non-charitable, social club, anthropomorphic-themed convention that was first held at the Doubletree Plaza Hotel in Montreal, Quebec, Canada. Anthrofest was a registered Association within Quebec, under the business name Festivale Internationale de l'Anthropomorphisme.

name: All Fur Fun
description: All Fur Fun was a furry convention that was first held from Friday March 30 to Sunday April 1, 2007 at the Ridpath Hotel in Spokane, Washington, U.S.A. All Fur Fun 2008 took place April 18-20, 2008, at the same location, with attendance of 165. All Fur Fun 2009 took place at the Mirabeau hotel.

name: Anthropolis
description: Une expérience conviviale dans un lieu idyllique. Votre convention entre montagnes et forêts.

name: Abando
description: Abando was the first furry convention to be held annually in Brazil. It was founded in 2008, and occurred during the Brazilian Carnival. The last edition was in 2016, with 87 campers.

name: Furcamp
description: FURCAMP is a furry event created in Brazil that takes place every year in mid-February (during Carnival). With its pilot edition in March 2019 being a success, the event captivated its participants and the team that created it.

name: Wüellas FurFest
description:
From the Spanish word “HUELLAS”, which means footprint, pawprint or trace:
The mark left by a human or animal when stepping on a surface.
A trace, sign, or vestige left by someone or something.

The prefix “Hu-” is changed to “Wü-” to resemble the romanized writing of the indigenous peoples.

name: Yunyou Island
description: Want to connect and interact with fellow Furry enthusiasts and creators? Then join Cloud Island! This is a Furry culture extravaganza you won't want to miss! You'll not only meet new friends but also receive a variety of exquisite gifts!

name: ConFuzzled
description:
ConFuzzled is the UK’s largest furry convention, hosted at the Hilton Birmingham Metropole.

Since our first convention in Manchester in 2008, ConFuzzled has grown year after year, and in 2025 we welcomed over 3000 attendees from all over the world to the West Midlands, raising over £40,000 for charity.

name: Capital Fur Con
description: Capital FurCon (CFC) is a new 21+ furry convention which will be held annually at the Gaylord National Resort & Convention Center! And you heard that right, 21+! We know what you're all here for!

name: Anthro Crossroads East
description:
Anthro Crossroads East (ACE) was an annual furry convention held in greater Raleigh, North Carolina, USA. It was presented by Tarpaw Furmeet.

The inaugural event took place January 26-28, 2018 at the Hampton Inn and Suites, Crabtree Valley[1], with the theme being "Furs Take Flight."

According to Tarpaw Furmeet, there were 295 attendees and 63 fursuiters with $6,200 in proceeds for convention charity CLAWS, Inc. of Chapel Hill, North Carolina.

name: Anthro East Coast
description: Anthro East Coast was a two-day annual furry convention held in Halifax, Nova Scotia. It was formerly referred to as the 'OMGWTFBBQ'.

name: Anthro New England
description: Anthro New England was organized in 2014 with the goal of hosting a furry convention in Greater Boston.[3] Their first event was held from February 27 to March 1, 2015, at the Hyatt Regency Cambridge in Cambridge, Massachusetts. During the first convention, 165 people took part in the fursuit parade.

name: Big Sky Camp Paw
description: Big Sky Camp Paw is run by Big Sky Anthro, Inc., a Montana non-profit corporation formed to promote the anthropomorphic arts in the Big Sky state. Big Sky Anthro is governed by a board of directors who select the con chairperson and other staff members each year.

name: Campfire Tails
description: Campfire Tails is a furry convention held in Oregon, USA. Unlike traditional conventions, it is a camping event akin to Camp Feral and Oklacon. Campfire Tails was founded and chaired by C.S. Mounier up to November 2012. Years 2013 and 2014 were chaired by Devin. As of 2015, C.S. Mounier is returning as active Chairman of Campfire Tails.

name: ČeSFuR
description: Česfur was first held in 2004 as the largest gathering of the then, Czech furry community and a few foreign guests. Since then, it has become an annual event growing from humble beginnings to a major international furry convention attracting hundreds of attendees. The con is a non-profit event and is organized with help of its attendees.

name: DenFur
description: DenFur is Colorado’s own furry fandom convention, hosted in the vibrant heart of Denver at the Sheraton Denver Downtown Hotel. Conveniently located just 25 miles from Denver International Airport by train, our convention is easy to access for both locals and furry fans from around the world!

name: Osaka Furry Fun Festa
description:
Osaka Furry Fun Festa (abbreviated: OFFF) is a furry convention held in Osaka!

The purpose of holding this event is to provide a place in Osaka where everyone with an interest in all things furry can gather and interact with each other, transcending boundaries between artists, costumer, musicians, performers and the like.

We hope you can take this opportunity to enjoy your time and experiences at the event, as well as enjoying all of the sights, sounds, and experiences Osaka has to offer.

name: Unfurgettable Taiwan Furry Gathering
description: Unfurgettable Taiwan Furry Gathering (UTFG) is a furry gathering organized by a group of enthusiasts who share a deep love for kemono and furry culture.

name: Borneo Anthro Hub
description: As the seasons change and the Golden Harvest nears, a call spreads across the land. Sean & Aminah seek out new hands and hopeful hearts to not only help out, but to also join along the celebration afterwards to share the joy of enjoying the fruits of labour together. Whether you are a seeker, a guardian, or a champion — your story starts here.

name: Melbourne Furry Convention
description:
Our mission is simple; to create events for the benefit of the furry community that promote connection, compassion and creativity. We aim to host events that celebrate the fandom, both in Victoria and abroad, and we’re proud to support charitable causes to give back to our wider community. 

We continue to strive to make MFC the perfect space to celebrate the best of what the furry community has to offer. Join us as we create this wonderful event – one paw, claw, and step at a time!

name: Gateway Furmeet
description: A furry convention annually held in Saint Louis, Missouri

name: Carolina Furfare
description: Carolina Furfare (previously known as Blue Ridge Furfare) is a convention inspired by its origin city of Asheville, NC, much like our mascots Petal, possum of the city, and her best squirrel friend Aster, the forest ranger, that represents a unique blend of those two worlds. A family-friendly celebration of those inspirations, CFF is devoted to the art, culture, and community of the furry fandom, Hickory, and the Blue Ridge Mountains!

name: CanFURence
description: CanFURence is Eastern Canada's premier furry convention, proudly held each year in Ottawa, Ontario. Since our founding in 2016, we've grown into a welcoming gathering space for fans of anthropomorphic art, literature, costumes, and creativity of all kinds. Whether you're a seasoned member of the fandom or just starting to explore, CanFURence offers a fun, inclusive environment to connect, celebrate, and express yourself.

name: Anthro New Mexico
description: Anthro New Mexico started with just three locals from Albuquerque. An impromptu photoshoot turned into a meet one day and the idea to create the ABQ Fursuit Group came to mind. In one month, their telegram grew to 280 members, and they revived a dead community with their biweekly Furmeets. Three months later, they began the process of creating New Mexico's first and only Furry Convention, Anthro New Mexico!

name: Purple Clouds Festival
description: Purple Clouds Festival (PCF), is a 18+ clothing optional, sex-positive furry music festival held in Hude, Germany, annually.

name: SloFluffCon
description: SloFluffCon is an annual furry convention hosted in Slovenia, held in the vibrant city of Ljubljana at the Grand Hotel Union, a historic and luxurious venue.

name: Confuror
description: Confuror is a space for all of us, which we have been building year after year. The team that develops and executes Confuror is made up of people from different professional areas, with different visions and originating from different countries. Each and every one of us who collaborate or have collaborated in this project are also members of the furry community. None of us, individually, represents the convention, its framework of values and principles, or its vision of the project.

name: Baltifur
description: Latvia’s furry convention in a beautiful, remote setting! We are a passionate team of fur-organizers, ready to make this year unforgettable. Join us for fun, relaxation, and community connection in a cozy location.

name: Patas
description: Patas is a hotel furry convention set on Sorocaba, Sao Paulo.

name: Anthros & Alpine
description:
Anthros & Alpine is a non-profit organization created to host Scandinavia’s first and only furry winter convention. We’re a team of dedicated volunteers led by Læxi, working on bringing together furs from across the world to ski and snowboard. All in one unforgettable experience! 

We aim to build a home for winter-loving furries here in the Nordics.

name: Furry Ski Weekend
description: FSW was created in 2007. In 2006 six of us made a weekend trip up to Copper, which was when we first experimented with fursuit skiing/snowboarding. The experience and time with friends was so much fun that we wanted to share it with others. We organized some close friends, rented an amazing house for the weekend, and we’ve continued that tradition every year, expanding out to include many new furry faces.

name: Barkada Furfest
description: Barkada FurFest is a furry convention held in the Philippines, created with the goal of giving our local furry community a safe, fun, and inclusive place to gather.

name: Tails and Tornadoes Fur Con
description: Tails and Tornadoes Fur Con is Tulsa's first hotel-based furry convention. Founded in 2019, TTFC offers programming full of learning, social interaction, and entertainment focused around the anthropomorphic arts.

name: Camp Feral!
description: Camp Feral! is a 19+ furry convention/summer camp held annually in the wilderness of Algonquin Park, Ontario. We offer non-stop excitement every day, from traditional camp activities like archery, canoeing, and ropes courses to our one-of-a-kind Camp Feral! activities such as Watermelon Football, MonFur Melee and more! During the evening you can attend campfires, musician's circles, and dances. Picture the perfect summer camp, except for adults... plus ears and tails!

name: Get Out The Float
description:
Get Out The Float exists to bring together joy, charity and civic duty for both our furry community and the larger human community that surrounds us.

We accomplish this by combining elements of furry conventions and charity fursuiting and engage the public to elevate local charities both visibly and financially.

name: SeaFur
description: Seafur (海兽聚) is an annual Chinese furry convention.

name: Noctfurnal
description: Michigan furry events hosted at queer friendly venues.

name: BangkokBeasts
description: BangkokBeasts is a gathering focused on furry and kemono fandom, providing a space for fans in Bangkok to connect through panels, artist alleys, and social events.

name: TechFurMeet
description: TFM is not a typical furry convention. It is a convention for furries, people who feel connected to animals, but it is dedicated to electronics, technology, programming.

name: Furrburg
description: Furrburg is a leading St. Petersburg community, founded on May 5, 2018. Since then, many events have taken place—walks, meetups, even fur conventions! Furrburg is actively developing, its audience is growing, and a favorable environment for furry community members is being created.

name: Vancoufur
description: VancouFur is Canada’s largest west coast furry convention held in beautiful British Columbia. A full 4-day con, VancouFur offers an opportunity to express your furry self against the gorgeous backdrop of Richmond, BC.

name: NordicFuzzCon
description: NordicFuzzCon is an annual event taking place in Sweden. It is aimed at members of the international furry community – people with an interest in animals with human characteristics, such as Bugs Bunny or Donald Duck – but all are welcome to attend.

name: Wild North
description: Wild North is a furry convention with a fuzzy twist. The convention takes place in a 14th century castle in the scenic and historic north of England. We offer a relaxed atmosphere, great companionship, and a whole host of fun.

name: Hi-Furry
description: Hi Furry was founded in early 2023. We are committed to promoting excellent Furry culture, adhering to the vision of "bringing convenient, pleasant and comfortable gathering experiences to furries", and striving to make every gathering leave a pleasant memory for everyone with a sincere and friendly attitude!

name: Midwest FurFest
description: Midwest FurFest is an annual convention which takes place in the west suburbs of Chicago, Illinois. We come together to celebrate the furry fandom, which includes art, literature and performances based around anthropomorphic animals.Midwest FurFest is a production of Midwest Furry Fandom, Inc, a 501(c)3 (non-profit corporation).

name: Anthro SoCal
description: Welcome to Anthro SoCal (formely Another Furry Con - AFC) - an annual furry convention in Southern California. Our convention brings together furries, artists, cosplayers, and enthusiasts for a weekend filled with fun, friendship, and community.
